18:   --red: oklch(55% 0.2 25);
19:   --red-dim: oklch(55% 0.2 25 / 0.08);
20:   --yellow: oklch(68% 0.16 85);

22:   --radius-sm: 8px;

24:   --radius-lg: 20px;
25:   --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
26:   --font-body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
27:   --font-mono: 'SF Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace;
28: }
29: * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
30: html, body { height: 100%; background: var(--bg); color: var(--fg); font-family: var(--font-body); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
31: body { display: flex; }
32: /* ---- Sidebar ---- */
33: .sidebar {
34:   width: 240px; flex-shrink: 0; background: var(--surface); border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
35:   display: flex; flex-direction: column;

62:   font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;

64: }

66:   display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px;
67:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;

74:   margin-left: auto; font-size: 11px; padding: 1px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 500;

76: }

78: .sidebar .nav-item .badge.red { background: var(--red-dim); color: var(--red); }
